pages.text: The $(item)Ocean Monument Skyseed$() — $(item)gold blocks$() and $(item)sponge$() around a $(item)diamond$(). A prismarine temple with guardians, a sponge room and a buried $(item)Heart of the Sea$(). Best thrown over a deep ocean.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Gold from a $(item)Badlands$() isle, diamond from the $(bold)deep$(); wet sponge dots the bed of a $(item)Large Aquatic$() isle thrown over an ocean — smelt it dry.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A sunken $(bold)prismarine temple$() on a sand island, lit from within by $(item)sea lanterns$(). $(bold)Guardians$() patrol its flooded halls and an $(bold)Elder Guardian$() guards the core — beware its mining-fatigue glare. Grow it over a $(item)deep ocean$().

$(bold)The reward$()$(br)Mine it for every $(item)prismarine$() — bricks and dark prismarine too — while the guardians drop the $(item)prismarine shards$() and crystals that finally unlock the $(item)Aquarium$(). A wet-sponge niche and a buried $(item)Heart of the Sea$() (for a $(item)Conduit$()) round out the haul.
